title: Sanji and Violet Change the Plan
description: Pages 11–15 focus on sanji and violet change the plan, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7 as sanji and Violet share information, Zoro and Kin'emon try to reach Luffy, and the Donquixote Family reacts to Violet's betrayal.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: How dare you!!? You've been threat- Ening me with that all day!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: And it's true... right now there's nothing inside my chest!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Hey!! What's wrong? Pull yourself together!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: What did you do!! That cry came from one of my men!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: You've really been holding me down with that "Gravity" of yours, Fufitora.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: !! so you still had some of that power!!! Law!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: That child just doesn't know when to give up...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: Let go of me, law, you bastard !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: So you were just buying time, brat!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: But there's no place to hide, is there!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: The fog's making it tough, but I can see a strange forest.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: So... what do we do after getting Caesar?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: Then Dofla- Mingo will come after us, right?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: Ehh!? What!? What!? What was that!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: It's a school of F...F...Fight- ing fish!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: You went and got too close to the island!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: They're the murderous fish that can even sink bat- tleships!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: That's right, follow me, Dofla- Mingo!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: If he goes for the ship now, we're done for!! I'll lead him as far as the bridge and then send Caesar over...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: If I can face him alone on the bridge...!!-I can buy enough time for the ship to escape...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #42
dialogue.text: In your book, Nami, MOMONOSURE, Chopper

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #43
dialogue.text: What? You intend to cross the bridge!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #44
dialogue.text: If you head to dressrosea, then you'll be on my home turf.

summary: Sanji and Violet Change the Plan focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as sanji and Violet share information, Zoro and Kin'emon try to reach Luffy, and the Donquixote Family reacts to Violet's betrayal.
